questions.question: Paul urges believers to maintain the unity of the Spirit in what?
Paul says Christ gave gifts to the church including apostles, prophets, evangelists, and what?
Paul tells believers to be angry but not to sin, and not to let the sun go down on their anger.
There is one body, one Spirit, one hope, one Lord, one faith, one baptism, one God and _____ of all.
Be kind to one another, tenderhearted, _____ each other, just as God also in Christ forgave you.
